description: We are seeking a nurse for our summer job opportunity in Vehmaa, Uusikaupunki, Nousiainen, and Raisio. As a nursing expert in a multiprofessional team, you will provide customer care, plan, implement, and evaluate nursing work while supporting your colleagues. We offer a versatile work community with comprehensive training and flexible working conditions. A valid LOVe drug license, experience treating memory patients, and knowledge of the Pegasos-OMNI patient information system are required. Excellent oral and written Finnish language skills are essential. The eligibility requirement for this position is the legalization of a nurse in accordance with the Act on Healthcare Professionals (559/1994).
what_we_expect: You are a self-directed team player who takes responsibility and works goal-oriented. We consider it an advantage to have a valid LOVe drug license, experience in the treatment of memory patients and working to support functional capacity, as well as knowledge of the Pegasos-OMNI patient information system and knowledge of the RAI evaluation instrument.
We value the ability to work in a multiprofessional team. In your work, you need good oral and written Finnish language skills.
The summer placements we offer

description: Turku Normal School is seeking two special class teachers for temporary positions from August 1, 2026, to July 31, 2027. The primary school position offers studies and/or experience in special education classes as an additional merit. A university practice qualification and good teaching skills are required. Applicants must demonstrate the ability to work with students and guardians individually, build a safe learning environment, and have flexible and solution-oriented approaches. The salary is 3,909.47 euros per month, with a six-month trial period before starting work. For more information or to apply, visit [Turku Normal School](https://sites.utu.fi/tnk/) (Norssi) on the University of Turku's website and contact Tuija Niemi at +358 50 367 0336 for further details.
what_we_expect: Qualification of a special class teacher and good teaching skills
Two years of work experience as a special education teacher after graduation
Submitting the application: The application must be submitted via the electronic application form.
job_responsibilities: Supporting students' well-being and planning implementation of both group-specific support and student-specific support in close cooperation with class teachers, subject teachers, and other school staff.
Supervising teaching trainees as a safe and pedagogically strong instructor who supports their professional growth and guides them in collaboration with other teacher education professionals.
Qualification of a special class teacher and good teaching skills
what_we_offer: An interesting and responsible teaching position in a training school as part of the Faculty of Education of the University of Turku, offering excellent opportunities to develop professional skills both in your work as a teacher and as a supervisor of teaching trainees.
Access to modern teaching facilities and necessary tools.

title: Sociologist in Early Childhood Education
meta_description: Apply now for a Sociologist in early childhood education role at Åbo stad. Join a growing team and build your career in Turku.
description: We are looking for six regular social worker positions within Swedish-language early childhood education in Åbo stad, Finland. As a sociologist in early childhood education, you will work closely with children and support their well-being, learning, and social development. Your focus is on positive pedagogy, highlighting strengths, seeing opportunities, and building an inspiring environment where joy, curiosity, and participation are central. You plan, implement, and document activities together with the team while actively contributing to children's full potential. We offer a stable work environment, special teachers and reserve staff, digital tools for planning and documentation, and support from colleagues who care for each other.
what_we_expect: Passionate about children's learning, development, and social well-being.
Works with positive pedagogy - you see each child's strengths and create conditions for them to grow.
Believes in collaboration, participation, and builds trusting relationships with children, families, and colleagues.
Has a preventive approach and the ability to see the big picture.
Wants to be involved in creating an everyday life where security, quality, and learning go hand in hand.
job_responsibilities: Supporting children's well-being, learning, and social development.
Highlighting the children's strengths, seeing opportunities, and building a business where joy, curiosity, and participation are at the center.
Your assignment
what_we_offer: A stable and supportive work environment
Own special teachers and reserve staff who create security and continuity for children and staff
Digital tools as support in planning and documentation - so you can spend your time on meaningful educational work
Colleagues who care for each other, supporting, lifting, and inspiring each other
